locations.name: 愛德華·布萊思
locations.summary: 愛德華·布萊思（英語：Edward Blyth，1810年12月23日—1873年12月27日）是一位英國動物學家，其一生中的絕大部分時間都在印度加爾各答的孟加拉亞洲學會博物館內擔任策展人。 布萊思於1810年生於倫敦，於1841年移居至…

relations.subject: Rufous-vented grass babbler
relations.evidence: The rufous-vented grass babbler or rufous-vented prinia (Laticilla burnesii) is a small warbler in the family Pellorneidae that occurs in Pakistan, northwestern India and Nepal

relations.subject: Rufous-vented grass babbler
relations.evidence: (However, the swamp grass babbler of Assam and Bangladesh is often combined with this species.) It inhabits a variety of long grasslands, notably plains of sarkhan (Saccharum) but also plains of elephant grass and ekra grass, sometimes where mixed with acacias and tamarisks
